g.text: KEY: peek() = inspect only (cursor stays) | advance() = consume + move cursor
peek() | source[current] | current UNCHANGED | safe to call repeatedly
advance() | source[current] | current += 1 | updates line/column always
peek() | returns '\0' at EOF | never raises | safe sentinel
advance() | ONLY place line/col | updated here | no other code touches it
pattern | peek() to decide | advance() to act | two-phase consume
